summary: PVT BXTOEM testing on SV2K8122 using InstallPVT-BXTOEM.1.0.193.400.exe
evidence: A test was run on SV2K8122 using InstallPVT-BXTOEM.1.0.193.400 and it passed except for BIOS - IFWI issues.

The latest nightly build was fetched from https://git-amr-1.devtools.intel.com/gerrit/ecdl_dbg-northpeak-sdk refs/changes/49/63649/2. The build script was run using C:\npk_sdk\scripts\build-sdk.cmd -64 -e and then C:\npk_sdk\scripts\build-sdk.cmd -64 -r -b
